notes.donor_seed_copy_behavior: campaign round preparation copies donor_root/seed into the new round task before the new seed worker runs, so grep can surface both inherited historical artifacts and newly-written artifacts in the same seed directory.
notes.expat_xmlparse_caveat: The literal pattern "xmlparse.c" also matches legitimate expat-native symbols and file paths, so expat grep hits must be interpreted together with geoToStringDegs/fuzzerCellArea and JSON field paths rather than as cross-project leakage by themselves.
notes.cjson_current_failure_shape: After the function_selector-only patch, cJSON no longer showed geoToStringDegs/fuzzerCellArea in the new selector artifacts, but Copyright still survives in selected_target_functions as a pm_callers-derived test symbol, and downstream manifests still carry Copyright/xmlparse.c entries.

honest_conclusion.summary: This 15-minute smoke did not satisfy the strict grep-empty acceptance rule. Eligible pools stayed healthy (expat 25, cJSON 27) and log-level primary targets were project-local, but the new seed task directories still contained matched strings. expat still carried geoToStringDegs/fuzzerCellArea plus many native xmlparse.c paths, and cJSON still carried Copyright in new selector/downstream artifacts.
